items.title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Nvidia, J.M. Smucker, Trade Desk, Nutanix & more
items.description: These are the stocks posting the largest moves before the bell.

items.title: Nvidia still hasn't sold its U.S.-approved China AI chips — and it’s worried local AI rivals could take over
items.description: The U.S. chipmaker has yet to confirm shipments to China despite Washington easing restrictions on exports of advanced chips.

items.title: China holiday spending sends a strong signal on consumer stimulus plans
items.description: China's nine-day Lunar New Year holiday showed consumers were eager to travel, while remaining price-conscious.

items.title: Stocks making the biggest moves after hours: Nvidia, Salesforce, Snowflake, Nutanix & more
items.description: These are the stocks posting the largest moves in extended trading.

items.title: Are collectibles a viable asset class? The buyer of the $16.5 million Pokémon card thinks so
items.description: AJ Scaramucci thinks trading cards have experienced tremendous growth, and thus they, and other collectibles, are great alternative investments.
